data.body: CLOSING as handled-by-process (operator decision 2026-07-12), NOT as work-done. The post-deployment field measurement this ticket tracked does not need a standalone parked ticket: (1) the data-logging is DOCUMENTED durably — the exact re-runnable queries live in the epic 9d50 AC2 measurement-framework comment (code-review block/false-block counts over code_review_result_v1 sidecars; plan-review advisory-uptake via norm_id survival) and the committed CI-verifiable file docs/experiments/plan-review-gate/g7-promotion-path.md (G7 fire-rate jq query + 0.6-0.7 promotion band); (2) calibration is a RECURRING practice — the next calibration session will naturally re-run these queries against post-deploy field data to assess these gate changes, exactly as the 2026-07-12 session analyzed the prior cohort. The one substantive follow-up — b9c0's 0.54 code-review block threshold is PROVISIONAL and needs a non-circular held-out adjudication before it is relied on in production — is preserved in b9c0's own AC and the epic AC2 caveat, so nothing is lost by not tracking it here.
